title: Malaysian-Style Chicken Satay
description: A popular Southeast Asian dish of marinated chicken grilled to perfection and served with spicy peanut sauce. Perfect for a quick dinner or as an appetizer.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine coconut milk, lime juice, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, and brown sugar. Blend until smooth.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix until coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
In a small saucepan, combine peanut butter, 2 tablespoons of water, and 1 tablespoon of soy sauce. Whisk until smooth.
Serve the grilled chicken with peanut sauce, satay sauce, and your favorite sides, such as rice or vegetables.
Optional: Garnish with fresh cilantro, basil, or mint leaves.
